title: Infected Blood Memorial Service at St. Paul’s Cathedral on Tuesday 19 May 2026
body: " The service will start at 11am, and last for an hour. The service will be Christian based, but all faiths will be involved and welcome.  The service will be predominantly for members of the infected blood community.    Please register your interest by completing the survey.    Supporters and champions of the community may also attend. You can encourage anyone you would like to attend to complete the form. Due to the capacity of St. Paul’s Cathedral, this will be a ticketed event. Those who would like to attend in-person will be able to register their interest. If necessary, a ballot system will be used. You can also subscribe to our mailing list for further updates. For further information about St. Paul’s Cathedral and its accessibility as a venue, please view the visitor information on their website.    To see how we will handle your personal data, please click here to view our privacy notice. "
